who: small law firms processing 5–15 legal files/month
offer: For small law firms processing 5–15 legal files/month, inefficient management causes compliance risks. We digitize and organize legal files instead of manual filing systems or basic digital storage solutions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about legal workflows
DM outreach to small law firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for legal tools
try_it: Let users try document scanning and file organization on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
